message:
revert(pager): revert V1.3 eager PageData — causes stale data on page mutation

The eager PageData creation in StagedPage::from_buf() captured the page
bytes at write time, but subsequent in-place mutations (via
as_page_bytes_mut) made the cached PageData stale. This caused data
corruption ("rowid 0 payload is not a valid SQLite record") during
COMMIT when the memdb reload read the stale published page.

Reverts to the lazy OnceLock approach that creates PageData from current
bytes on first read. The lazy copy is safe because it reads the
CURRENT state of the Buffered page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
